prose: Fukui reactivity indices for nitrobenzene — electrophilic (f⁺) and nucleophilic (f⁻) condensed Fukui functions computed by single-point DFT (tier standard: B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI-J density fitting) in PySCF via chemkit. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided nitrobenzene.xyz, no optimization. SCF converged for the neutral (N), cation (N+1, doublet), and anion (N−1, doublet) states. Most electrophilic site: C atom 4 (1-based) with f⁺ = 0.4964178. Most nucleophilic site: C atom 5 (1-based) with f⁻ = 0.1072882. Warnings reported verbatim: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge); sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge); common header present.
